overview: Bharatiya Engineering Science and Technology Innovation University (BESTIU), established in 2019, is a private university located in Gownivaripalli, Anantapur, Andhra Pradesh. It is designed as a world-class eco-friendly university focusing on innovation, research, and industry-aligned education across engineering, agriculture, and management.
accreditation: Recognized by the University Grants Commission (UGC) under Section 2(f). Affiliated with the Association of Indian Universities (AIU) and accredited by NAAC.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI, Data Science, Cyber Security, etc.)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 50% aggregate in PCM + BEE/AP EAPCET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admission is primarily through the BEE (BESTIU Entrance Exam). Candidates are shortlisted based on entrance scores followed by an interview process. National/State level exam scores (like AP EAPCET) are also considered for relevant courses.
admissions.importantDates: BEE 2026 Application: Open; Exam Phases: April - June 2026; Session Starts: August 2026.

campus.specialNote: The university emphasizes sustainability and has a distinct focus on Agri-Tech. It offers 'Placement Opportunity Programs' (POP) which include career readiness training and guaranteed interview opportunities.

contact.address: Gownivaripalli, Gorantla Mandal, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh - 515231
